title: Death Coin Mod
description:
A mod that allows you to retrive your dropped items after death.

May be used as an alternative to keep inventory.
body:
**A mod that allows you to regain your items and XP after death.**
(The mod only restores levels and not intermediate progress.)

This is an Alternative to keepInventory.
Give the players the power to decide whether to keep the stuff or not.

After **respawning**, you will get a **death coin** in your **inventory**.
Hover over the death coin to see your lost items and Level(configurable length).
Press shift to see all the items.
Right-click the item to regain lost items and XP.

Use with **scoreboards** and **item usage** to **monitor death coin usage**:
```
/scoreboard objectives add Example minecraft.used:deathcoinmod.death_coin
/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar Example
```

Use the config file to specify the size of the item list(when hovering).

If you want the source code, just send me a message.

Feel free to use in modpacks.
